title: TALENT TREE
intro: Choose your path. One spec at a time. 2 choices per tier.
respecHint: To change specialization, buy a Neural Respec Chip from the shop (50,000 credits).
respecMessage: All your talents will be erased and your points recovered. Your specialization will be unlocked. The Neural Respec Chip will be consumed.

hacker.label: HACKER
hacker.description: Raw click power. Every strike counts.

netrunner.label: NETRUNNER
netrunner.description: Passive income. Your daemons mine while you sleep.

chrome_dealer.label: CHROME DEALER
chrome_dealer.description: Economy and loot. Real power is money.
